div.head: No. 5525.—United States of America.

p.hi: To all to whom these presents shall come, greeting:

div.p: I certify that the documents hereto annexed are true copies from the files of this Department.
In testimony whereof I, John Hay, Secretary of State of the United States, have hereunto subscribed my name and caused the seal of the Department of State to be affixed.
div.closer:
Done at the city of Washington this 1st day of September, A. D. 1900, and of the Independence of the United States of America the one hundred and twenty-fifth.
[Seal of the Department of State,
United States of America.] John Hay.

postscript.p: (For certification of Exhibits A, B, and C.)
